Python Path.__desc: Path to the Python executable to use for running games. Prefix with "$/" to start relative to the default bytefight client userdata directory.

Bots Directory.__desc: Directory to search in when looking for bots. Prefix with "$/" to start relative to the default bytefight client userdata directory.

Maps Directory.__desc: Directory to search in when looking for maps. Attempts to parse all json files. Prefix with "$/" to start relative to the default bytefight client userdata directory.

Matches Directory.__desc: Directory to save and load match data from. These don't contain any information about the games themselves, only metadata. Prefix with "$/" to start relative to the default bytefight client userdata directory.

Games Directory.__desc: Directory to save and load game data from. These are the PGNs that specify actual game states/moves. Prefix with "$/" to start relative to the default bytefight client userdata directory.

Logs Directory.__desc: Directory to save and load stdio logs of game runs from. Prefix with "$/" to start relative to the default bytefight client userdata directory.

Reload Default Maps on Startup.__desc: Whether default maps should always be re-populated upon app startup, even if you've deleted them before. This does NOT overwrite any edits made to default maps, only restores deleted ones.
